channel.title: Aleksei Riumin | Senior Infrastructure Architect
channel.description: Recent content on Aleksei Riumin | Senior Infrastructure Architect

item.title: Physics vs. Marketing: Real AV1300 PowerLine Speeds on Old Aluminum Wire
item.description: How to salvage a remote network link when underground conduits fail. Testing TP-Link AV1300 over 2-core aluminum and optimizing IP cameras for constrained links.

item.title: Cost-Effective Kubernetes: Hardware Isolating Dev & Prod Environments in a Single Cluster
item.description: Learn how to use Kubernetes Node Affinity to safely run Development and Production environments within a single cluster, saving B2B infrastructure costs.

item.title: Proxmox Server Crash: Recovering XFS Data After a Catastrophic NVMe Failure
item.description: How to handle a sudden NVMe controller failure in Proxmox VE. Step-by-step XFS troubleshooting, read-only data salvage, and hardware migration.

item.title: Welcome to My Digital Garden: Infrastructure & DevOps
item.description:
Hello! I am an Infrastructure Architect, System Administrator, and Independent IT Consultant.

This repository serves as my engineering diary and professional portfolio. Here, I document everything from hands-on hardware repair to high-level network architecture and cloud-native solutions.

🛠 What I Do

My expertise spans the entire IT stack—from the physical layer to advanced virtualization:

  • Network Architecture & Physical Infrastructure: Designing, planning, and deploying local area networks. My most extensive hands-on project involved engineering a network utilizing over 4,500 meters of UTP cable.
  • Server Virtualization & Management: Building and maintaining high-availability clusters using Proxmox and Docker containerization.
  • IT Consulting & Business Support: Operating as an independent contractor, I currently manage infrastructure and provide SLA-backed support for 23 corporate clients (ranging from 3 to 100 workstations per site).
  • Hardware & Systems Troubleshooting: Diagnosing and repairing servers, setting up IP/VoIP telephony, and integrating CCTV/Access Control systems.

📚 Certifications & Continuous Learning

I believe in a solid security foundation followed by advanced routing and orchestration:

item.title: Certificates & Qualifications — Aleksei Riumin
item.description: Official MikroTik and Kaspersky certifications confirming high-level expertise in building secure enterprise networks and cybersecurity. Entrust your business IT infrastructure to a certified professional.

item.title: Client Testimonials & Official Recommendations
item.description: Official letters of recommendation from B2B clients verifying successful enterprise IT infrastructure deployments, zero-downtime migrations, and secure network architectures.

item.title: My Valued Clients — B2B IT Partner for Business
item.description: Over 25 B2B clients across industries: manufacturing, healthcare, construction, retail, and agriculture. Strategic IT partner for infrastructure deployment, networking, and digital solutions.

item.title: Resume — Aleksei Riumin | Senior IT Infrastructure Architect
item.description: Professional resume of Aleksei Riumin — Senior IT Infrastructure & Network Architect with 20+ years of experience. Expert in enterprise networks, server virtualization, cybersecurity, and zero-downtime IT migrations.
